mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_daily_statistics ( stat_date, total_users, new_users, active_users, course_views, lesson_views, total_study_time, assignment_submissions, question_posts, answer_posts, comment_posts, create_time ) VALUES ( #{statDate}, #{totalUsers}, #{newUsers}, #{activeUsers}, #{courseViews}, #{lessonViews}, #{totalStudyTime}, #{assignmentSubmissions}, #{questionPosts}, #{answerPosts}, #{commentPosts}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_daily_statistics SET total_users = #{totalUsers}, new_users = #{newUsers}, active_users = #{activeUsers}, course_views = #{courseViews}, lesson_views = #{lessonViews}, total_study_time = #{totalStudyTime}, assignment_submissions = #{assignmentSubmissions}, question_posts = #{questionPosts}, answer_posts = #{answerPosts}, comment_posts = #{commentPosts} WHERE stat_date = #{statDate}
